zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel ap Gwilym於1365年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾朋特時，他的父親Gwilym " Goch" ap Ieuan26歲，母親Mrs. Gwilym Goch ap Ieuan22歲。他和Mrs. Ieuan ap Hywel至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1438年7月4日在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾拉格藍享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel ap Gwilym于1365年出生在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾朋特时，他的父亲Gwilym " Goch" ap Ieuan26岁，母亲Mrs. Gwilym Goch ap Ieuan22岁。他和Mrs. Ieuan ap Hywel至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1438年7月4日在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾拉格藍享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel ap Gwilym was born in 1365, in Penpont, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gwilym " Goch" ap Ieuan, was 26 and his mother, Mrs. Gwilym Goch ap Ieuan, was 22. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Mrs. Ieuan ap Hywel. He died on 4 July 1438, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. Ieuan ap Hywel. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1438, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel ap Gwilym 1365 in Penpont, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gwilym " Goch" ap Ieuan 26 und seine Mutter Mrs. Gwilym Goch ap Ieuan 22. Er hatte mit Mrs. Ieuan ap Hywel mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Juli 1438 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Gwilymが1365年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアペンプオントで生まれた時，父Gwilym " Goch" ap Ieuanは26歳，母Mrs. Gwilym Goch ap Ieuanは22歳であった。彼はMrs. Ieuan ap Hywelとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1438年7月4日にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Gwilym(이)가 1365년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 펜폰트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gwilym " Goch" ap Ieuan(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Gwilym Goch ap Ieuan(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Mrs. Ieuan ap Hywel(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 7월 4일 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel ap Gwilym родился в 1365 г. в местности пенпонт, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gwilym " Goch" ap Ieuan было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Gwilym Goch ap Ieuan, 22. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Mrs. Ieuan ap Hywel. Он умер 4 июля 1438 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel ap Gwilym nació en 1365, en Penpont, Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gwilym " Goch" ap Ieuan, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs. Gwilym Goch ap Ieuan, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Mrs. Ieuan ap Hywel. Murió el 4 de julio de 1438, en Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
